PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Alexander Hoffman (Special Administrator).

The Court stated that the petition is procedurally ready to be granted. Mr. Schultz stated that there is a pending heggstad petition in case number 302842 and that if granted the estate will receive assets. Mr. Schultz also stated that there was the issue of whether there were any assets and the issue of whether there was going to be an action against the former Attorney for the Decedent which has settled. The Court informed Mr. Schultz that it will not continue to extend special letters when there is no issue of urgency and stated that the special letters process is only designed to provide short term remedy while the petition for probate is pending. Mr. Schultz asked to pass the matter so that he could exit the courtroom and consult with his Client. Upon returning, Mr. Schultz stated that he is withdrawing his petition. The Petition for Probate of Will and for letters Testamentary is withdrawn and off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
